title: DrillMiner
body:
**⛏️ DrillPlugin – The Ultimate Mining Drill for Minecraft! ⛏️**
**
Mine Faster, Mine Smarter!

DrillPlugin is a powerful mining drill plugin designed to help players dig through large areas quickly and efficiently! Whether you're a casual miner or running a large-scale excavation, this plugin makes mining easier and more rewarding.**

Why should you pick this over others? Well, it has support for both 1.20 and 21 and almost none of this kind exist! The plugin developer, me, will try to add almost all suggestions given!

⚙️ **Features:**

**✔️ Three Drill Types: Choose from Basic, Standard, and Advanced drills, each with increasing power and efficiency!

✔️ Customizable Settings: Configure drill cost, duration, mining distance, and repair costs in the config!

✔️ Repair System: Use Vault money or Diamonds to repair your drill after mining!

✔️ User-Friendly Commands: Easy-to-use commands like /drill buy, /drill stop, and /drill reload!

✔️ Permissions Support: Customize who can use, buy, and manage drills with permissions!**

**Drill Types:**


⚡ **Basic Drill**:  Iron Pickaxe – Mines up to 30 blocks for 10 seconds (configurable and can be enabled or disabled) 


⚡ **Standard Drill**: Diamond Pickaxe – Mines up to 50 blocks for 15 seconds (configurable and can be enabled or disabled)


⚡ **Advanced Drill**: Netherite Pickaxe – Mines up to 70 blocks for 20 seconds(configurable and can be enabled / disabled


**️ After mining, drills can be repaired for:**


✔️ **Basic Drill**: 2 Diamond by default (or Vault money if configured or other items)


✔️ **Standard Drill**: 4 Diamonds by default (or Vault money if configured or other items)


✔️ **Advanced Drill**: 6 Diamonds by default (or Vault money if configured or other items)


**Commands:**
️

⚡ /drill buy [type] – Buy a drill (basic, standard, advanced) 


⚡ /drill stop – Stop your active drill 


⚡ /drill reload – Reload plugin settings works if you don't like to restart after each change

**Permissions:**

✔️ **drill.use** – Allows using a mining drill (good for people who want a specific rank to use drills)


✔️ **drill.buy** – Allows purchasing drills(just the /drill buy [type] command)


✔️ **drill.stop** – Allows stopping active drills


✔️ **drill.admin** – Full admin control, including plugin reload
(is good when you only want some people to be able to reload the plugin)

✔️ **drill.bypass** - For WorldGuard regions | to let people mine in any worldguard region using drills |

**Vault is Required!**
Vault is needed for money-based drill repairs. Make sure Vault is installed for it to work! Also use a economy hooker like EssentialsX for it to actually work!
**Optional: WORLDGUARD**
Worldguard is needed if you have a spawn and want to protect it from people trying to destroy it!

**Installation 🛠️**

1️⃣ Download the plugin .jar file. (from modrinth or spigot)

2️⃣ Place it in your server's plugins/ folder.(just drag it in there)

3️⃣ Restart your server.
(needed for the changes to work!)

4️⃣ Configure your settings in the config.yml.( if you want a different repair cost or any other thing )

5️⃣ Enjoy automated mining! 🎉( if you have configured your config, do /drill reload )

6️⃣ Also if updating, delete the drillplugin folder to let the update work! ( needed to update lang and config files. if you have some settings, write them down and you will change them after the reinstall of the folder)

Get ready to revolutionize mining in Minecraft! Equip your drill and start digging today! ⛏️

[![PlayerCONSOLE ad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d058bf6c8422c553e1843b0cb2efcb237d345e39.png)](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/%E2%9C%A8%E3%80%90%E2%98%85-player%E2%9C%A6console-%E2%98%85%E3%80%91%E2%9C%A8-%E2%8E%AE-remote-admin-panel-50-off-%E2%8E%AE-velocity-support-file-managing-%E2%9B%8F%EF%B8%8F.126241/)
